title: Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services:
Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services!
